---
title: "SMGT Capstone"
author: "Sean McGarry"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
#############################################
# NFL Betting Data: 2015–2025
#############################################

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)

#############################################
# Load NFL schedules with betting lines
#############################################

seasons <- 2015:2025

nfl_games <- map_dfr(
  seasons,
  ~ fast_scraper_schedules(seasons = .x)
)

#############################################
# Clean and select relevant variables
#############################################

nfl_games_clean <- nfl_games %>%
  mutate(
    home_margin = home_score - away_score,
    away_margin = away_score - home_score
  )

#############################################
# Create betting outcome variables
#############################################

nfl_games_clean <- nfl_games_clean %>%
  mutate(
    home_cover = ifelse(home_margin - spread_line > 0, 1, 0),
    away_cover = 1 - home_cover
  )

#############################################
# Create team-level dataset
#############################################

team_games <- nfl_games_clean %>%
  select(game_id, gameday,
         home_team, away_team,
         home_margin, away_margin, spread_line, season) %>%
  
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(home_team, away_team),
    names_to = "home_away",
    values_to = "team"
  ) %>%
  
  mutate(
    margin = ifelse(home_away == "home_team",
                    home_margin,
                    away_margin),
    
    expected_margin = ifelse(home_away == "home_team",
                             spread_line,
                             -spread_line),
    
    spread_error = margin - expected_margin
  ) %>%
  
  arrange(team, gameday) %>%
  group_by(team, season) %>%
  mutate(
    prev_margin = lag(margin),
    prev_spread_error = lag(spread_error)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

#############################################
# Define shock thresholds
#############################################

upper_threshold <- quantile(team_games$prev_spread_error, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE)
lower_threshold <- quantile(team_games$prev_spread_error, 0.10, na.rm = TRUE)

#############################################
# Create shock indicators
#############################################

team_games <- team_games %>%
  mutate(
    positive_shock_prev = ifelse(prev_spread_error >= upper_threshold, 1, 0),
    negative_shock_prev = ifelse(prev_spread_error <= lower_threshold, 1, 0)
  )

#############################################
# Create TRUE blowout indicators
# (shock + 14+ point differential)
#############################################

team_games <- team_games %>%
  mutate(
    blowout_win_prev  = ifelse(positive_shock_prev == 1 & prev_margin >= 14, 1, 0),
    blowout_loss_prev = ifelse(negative_shock_prev == 1 & prev_margin <= -14, 1, 0)
  )

#############################################
# Create home / away datasets for merging
#############################################

home_prev <- team_games %>%
  select(game_id, team, prev_margin) %>%
  rename(prev_home_margin = prev_margin)

away_prev <- team_games %>%
  select(game_id, team, prev_margin) %>%
  rename(prev_away_margin = prev_margin)

home_shocks <- team_games %>%
  select(game_id, team, positive_shock_prev, negative_shock_prev) %>%
  rename(
    home_positive_shock_prev = positive_shock_prev,
    home_negative_shock_prev = negative_shock_prev
  )

away_shocks <- team_games %>%
  select(game_id, team, positive_shock_prev, negative_shock_prev) %>%
  rename(
    away_positive_shock_prev = positive_shock_prev,
    away_negative_shock_prev = negative_shock_prev
  )

home_blowouts <- team_games %>%
  select(game_id, team, blowout_win_prev, blowout_loss_prev) %>%
  rename(
    home_blowout_win_prev  = blowout_win_prev,
    home_blowout_loss_prev = blowout_loss_prev
  )

away_blowouts <- team_games %>%
  select(game_id, team, blowout_win_prev, blowout_loss_prev) %>%
  rename(
    away_blowout_win_prev  = blowout_win_prev,
    away_blowout_loss_prev = blowout_loss_prev
  )

#############################################
# Merge everything back to main dataset
#############################################

nfl_games_clean <- nfl_games_clean %>%
  left_join(home_shocks, by = c("game_id", "home_team" = "team")) %>%
  left_join(away_shocks, by = c("game_id", "away_team" = "team")) %>%
  left_join(home_prev, by = c("game_id", "home_team" = "team")) %>%
  left_join(away_prev, by = c("game_id", "away_team" = "team")) %>%
  left_join(home_blowouts, by = c("game_id", "home_team" = "team")) %>%
  left_join(away_blowouts, by = c("game_id", "away_team" = "team"))

#############################################
# Final filter
#############################################

nfl_games_clean <- nfl_games_clean %>%
  filter(!is.na(spread_line),
         game_type == "REG")
```
